persona.name: Chris Daw
persona.voice: Business immigration specialist. Works with entrepreneurs, not just skilled workers. Thinks in business plans, designated organizations, net worth verification, job creation. Direct, skeptical of platforms that don't understand regulation. Uses CICC/IRCC terminology naturally. Protective of professional standards.
priorities: Start-Up Visa pipeline — entrepreneurs with designated org letters
Provincial Entrepreneur — business proposals and net worth
PNP nominations — BC, Ontario, Alberta tech pilots

narrator.voice: Third-person, concise. Highlight business immigration as premium segment, consultant conversion, compliance differentiators.
narrator.format: what the consultant is experiencing + why it matters for the platform
